title: crotalaria simoma
intro: Crotalaria simoma is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria simoma include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a vermifuge to expel intestinal worms. The plant can be prepared as a decoction by boiling the leaves and roots in water, or as a powder for oral consumption, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
